app.name: Ralph Anthony
app.tagline: A real-time system to track every material entering and leaving the site — accurate, secure, and always up to date.

common.quantityError: Quantity must be greater than zero.
common.savedOffline: Saved offline. It will sync automatically once the connection returns.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live inventory, low-stock signals, and recent activity update across connected devices in real time.
dashboard.noActivity: Activity will appear here once stock moves are recorded.
dashboard.exportsSubtitle: Export the full transaction ledger directly from the dashboard.
dashboard.belowThresholdText: are at or below their configured threshold.

materials.title: Material Management
materials.subtitle: Clean, searchable stock records with thresholds, current balance, and status colors that stay in sync.
materials.name: Name

stockIn.title: Stock In — New Delivery
stockIn.noMaterials: Create at least one material before recording stock in.
stockIn.createMaterialFirst: Create at least one material first so stock can be recorded.

stockOut.title: Stock Out — Record Usage
stockOut.noMaterials: Create at least one material before recording stock out.
stockOut.noLevels: Create work levels first to enable stock out.
stockOut.createMaterialFirst: Create at least one material first so stock can be consumed.
stockOut.createLevelFirst: Create at least one work level before recording usage.
stockOut.insufficient: Only {{availableQuantity}} currently available for this material.

history.title: Transaction History
history.subtitle: Every stock move is appended, never edited. Export the filtered view for reports or archiving.
history.noMatch: No transactions match the current filter.
history.appendOnly: This ledger is append-only. Corrections happen via new compensating entries, never edits or deletes.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: A sharper view of site demand, current stock depth, and how inventory is moving over time.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Threshold alerts are reflected here immediately when realtime updates arrive from Supabase.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personal preferences stay simple, and the whole app stays on one admin workflow.

login.subtitle: Sign in to track materials, sync activity in realtime, and keep the site moving even when connectivity is patchy.
login.featureAccessText: One account type handles materials, usage, history, and notifications.
login.featureOfflineText: Queued submissions auto-sync when the network returns.
login.locked: Too many failed attempts. Please wait a moment before trying again.
login.setupNote: If Supabase is not configured yet, the app will still render but sign-in will return a setup message.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Create the admin account for the platform.
signup.created: Account created. You can now sign in.
